title: rubus × holandrei
intro: Rubus × holandrei, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly anthocyanins, which have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × holandrei include its ability to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and potentially lower the risk of certain diseases, such as heart disease and certain cancers. Rubus × holandrei is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and jams, to harness its medicinal properties and provide a natural source of antioxidants and other beneficial compounds.
